name: Youngster Ben
dialogue_before: Hey! I bet my Pokémon is stronger than yours!

name: Lass Lily
dialogue_before: La la la... Oh! A trainer! Battle me!
My Pokémon are cute AND strong!
dialogue_after: You won this time, but I'll be back!

name: Prof. Oak
dialogue: Welcome to the world of Pokémon!
Wild Pokémon lurk in the tall grass.
Press SPACE near a Pokémon to enter battle.
Catch Pokémon with Poké Balls from your bag.
Good luck on your adventure, Trainer!
